examples: You can do it even with a barebones budget.
A network namespace is used, and barebones read-write contents are created.
We will have only the barebones ones we need on board to prepare for the teaching process.
The UI is quite barebones, with a homepage consisting of a straightforward list of the reader's contents.
Outside of the cool roster, move sets and well-designed levels, the rest of the game feels a bit barebones.
